subsections.text: “Agent” means a salesman or other individual appointed by an automobile club to sell memberships in the club to the public.

“Automobile club” means a person who, for consideration, promises the membership assistance in matters relating to travel, and to the operation, use, or maintenance of a motor vehicle, by supplying services such as services related to:

subsections.label: G
subsections.text: bail bonds and legal fee reimbursement in the defense of traffic offenses; and

subsections.label: H
subsections.text: purchase of accidental injury and death benefits insurance coverage from an authorized insurance company.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
